ModifyParsingRecords.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](DNS/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
ModifyParsingRecords.type: DNS record type. Supported types: A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, PTR, SRV
ModifyParsingRecords.priority: Priority of MX record, range [0, 100]. Required when record type is MX.
